category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Git command to transform staged files using a formatting command.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo already points to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface from the supplied source facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/hallettj/git-format-staged, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies staged-file formatting; source_facts.executables lists git-format-staged.
